case_title: 954 GEARY STREET ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. YUSUF SOYLEMEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 954 GEARY STREET ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOYLEMEZ, YUSUF AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 958 GEARY STREET CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67505645)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOYLEMEZ, YUSUF AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
